water.name: Prosser Creek
aliases: Prosser Creek below Prosser Reservoir dam

authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(113) — Prosser Creek from the Prosser Reservoir dam downstream to the confluence with the Truckee River (Nevada Co.)
sources.quotedText: (113) Prosser Creek from the Prosser Reservoir dam downstream to the confluence with the Truckee River (Nevada Co.). All year. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

sources.title: California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 1654935, "Prosser Creek", Stream, CA, Nevada Co.
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":1654935,"gaz_name":"Prosser Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Nevada","objectid_1":1400794}. Mouth point (confluence with Truckee River) at (-120.116877, 39.370468). Corrects prior file coordinates (-120.1600, 39.3500), which were off by ~4.35 km from GNIS's recorded mouth point.

parameters.note: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: 0 trout — zero bag limit; catch-and-release only.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
